typography.font_sources: Load Cabinet Grotesk and Satoshi from Fontshare (https://api.fontshare.com/v2/css?f[]=cabinet-grotesk@800,500,700,900&f[]=satoshi@400,500,700&display=swap). Load JetBrains Mono from Google Fonts.

hierarchy.h1: text-5xl sm:text-6xl tracking-tighter leading-[0.9] font-black uppercase

layout.spacing: Generous spacing. Use p-8, p-12, p-16 for section padding. Avoid cramped containers.
layout.grid: Swiss Grid (12-column). Elements should span columns asymmetrically. Create a 'border-collapse' look with visible grid lines.
layout.radii: rounded-none (0px) - Strict Brutalist/Swiss constraint. No soft corners.
layout.alignment: Strict left-alignment for text. No center-aligned paragraphs. Asymmetry over symmetry.

components.navigation: Sticky top bar, z-50, backdrop-blur-xl with a 1px solid bottom border. Links should be monospaced and tiny (uppercase tracking-[0.2em]). Include dark/light toggle.
components.hero: Editorial layout. 'Anu Gupta' in massive typography. Sub-grid for Role (UI/UX Designer) and Stats. Left-aligned, heavy contrast. Optional use of hero_texture as a masked background element.
components.buttons: Rectangular, sharp corners (rounded-none). High contrast hover states (invert colors or switch to accent). Use JetBrains Mono for button text.
components.case_study_list: DO NOT use standard card grids. Use full-width horizontal rows that act as accordions or expandable panels. When expanded, reveal 4-step process and metrics. Use 1px borders to separate rows.
components.skills_grid: Exposed CSS grid with 1px borders between items. Monospaced typography for skill names. Tetris or bento grid style but completely sharp.
components.experience_timeline: Minimalist tabular layout. Year, Role, Company in distinct columns bordered by 1px lines. No traditional dots/lines.
components.contact_form: Minimal inputs. border-b only (no full box inputs). Focus state changes border-b to accent color. Floating labels.

motion.scrolling: Lenis smooth scroll (MANDATORY for premium feel).
motion.page_load: Framer motion staggered text reveal (words masking up from hidden overflow).
motion.interactions: Hover states should be sharp, instantaneous layout changes. Smooth transitions for color. Expandable case studies should animate height smoothly.

headshot.description: Black and white professional portrait for the About section.

hero_texture.description: High-end minimal design manual texture. Can be used in the hero background at low opacity (10-20%) or as a visual anchor.

case_studies.description: Abstract architectural UI composition for Filejet case study.
Geometric composition for Travog travel platform case study.
High-end 3D sleek curves representing Saudia Airlines feature design.

instructions_to_main_agent: Install and setup 'lucide-react' for sharp icons (stroke-width: 1.5).
Install and use 'framer-motion' for all animations and staggered text reveals.
Strictly follow the color hex codes for dark and light variables in your global CSS.
Add 'data-testid' to ALL interactive elements (buttons, links, form inputs, toggles, accordion triggers).
Avoid Shadcn 'Card' or 'Section' default wrappers. Build the layout with raw HTML + Tailwind to maintain the strict 1px bordered, sharp-cornered Swiss grid aesthetic.
Forms and Modals can use Shadcn logic, but strip away any rounded corners to match the rounded-none aesthetic.
For the case study list, build a custom expandable row (Accordion-style) rather than generic side-by-side cards.
